title: Type the worktree and item-kind config enums
description:
Type the worktree and item-kind config enums (report highest-leverage fix #5). Fixes a real TOML-vs-env case-sensitivity divergence.

## Sites
- `config.rs:741-795` — `WorktreeConfig.mode`/`enforce_leases` → `WorktreeMode`/`EnforcementMode` enums with `Deserialize` + `FromStr`. Collapses four duplicated dispatch tables, including the `EffectiveConfig` env-var branches at `config.rs:1183-1193` and `1226-1235`.
- `config.rs:322-323` — `ItemKindConfig.scope` → a `KindScopeConfig` enum, mirroring the sibling `SourceOfTruth` field, so bad tokens fail at parse time.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] `WorktreeConfig.mode` and `.enforce_leases` are typed enums (`WorktreeMode`, `EnforcementMode`) with `Deserialize` + `FromStr`; the duplicated string dispatch tables (incl. env-var branches) are collapsed to a single typed parse.
- [ ] TOML and environment-variable parsing of these values share one case-handling path (the previous case-sensitivity divergence is gone and covered by a test).
- [ ] `ItemKindConfig.scope` is a typed enum mirroring `SourceOfTruth`; an unknown scope token is a parse/deserialize error, not a silent fallback.
- [ ] `cargo-ci` and `code-review` pass; existing valid config files continue to load unchanged.
